en: Hi! How's it going? I can't hear you. I think you're on mute. You're on mute. Unmute yourself.
Can you hear me now? Oh, yeah. I can hear you now.
Oh, no. Hang on. You're breaking up. I didn't catch that. You keep cutting out.
Hello? You're frozen now. You're frozen. I give up. I'll call you back.

ko: 포기. 다시 전화할게. 어디 간 거야?
